{"step_by_step_thinking": "To find the lower limit of the average IOP that can be expected 95% of the time, we need to calculate the 95% confidence interval. Given the mean (μ) is 30 mm and the standard deviation (σ) is 1.0, we can use the formula: μ - 1.96 * σ. Plugging in the values, we get 30 - 1.96 * 1.0 = 28.04. The closest option to 28.04 is 28.", "answer_choice": "B"}
